construct: Decisive cavalry strike at the structural-pivot point vs. attritional engagement against the enemy mass
positive_pole: Identifies the single structural-pivot point in an opposing system — the king's location, the seam in the line, the catalyst node whose failure cascades through the entire opposing structure — and concentrates the personal cavalry strike at that point regardless of the attritional balance, treating victory as a phase-transition produced by the pivot's collapse rather than as a function of cumulative attrition
negative_pole: Engages the enemy mass through positional and attritional formations, treating victory as the cumulative product of tactical pressure across the front, with no specific concentration on a single structural-pivot point
behavioral_implication: When Alexander encounters an opposing system, his first cognitive move is to locate the structural-pivot point whose collapse will cascade through the rest of the system, and his operational move is to lead the personal cavalry strike at that point — accepting the narrow material-balance margin of the strike as the operational price of producing the phase-transition collapse that attritional engagement cannot reliably produce

construct: Lead-from-front personal-risk as morale-multiplier vs. command-from-rear preservation of leadership-continuity
positive_pole: Personally executes the highest-risk operational moment — the cavalry charge at Chaeronea, the river crossing at Granicus, the wall-jump at Multan, the personal mounting of Bucephalus — treating visible-courage exposure to the same risk as the troops as the load-bearing morale-multiplier whose multiplicative effect on army performance exceeds the structural cost of leadership-continuity loss
negative_pole: Preserves leadership-continuity by managing the highest-risk operational moments from a position of command-safety, delegating the personal-execution to subordinates, treating the structural cost of leadership-continuity loss as decisively load-bearing relative to the morale-multiplier from visible-courage exposure
behavioral_implication: When Alexander encounters a high-stakes operational moment, he will personally execute the highest-risk action — accepting the personal-injury and continuity-loss probabilities as the operational price of the morale-multiplier that converts the army's performance ceiling, rather than delegating the action to subordinates whose exposure cannot produce the same multiplicative effect

positive_pole: Treats the operational objective as continuously expandable beyond any specific stated terminus — refusing peace offers that would consolidate immense gains, marching across the Gedrosian Desert when the campaign's substantive objectives have been achieved, founding Alexandria-Eschate at the empire's farthest edge — because the objective's continued expansion is itself the load-bearing cognitive structure of the operational discipline, and bounded-objective consolidation is operationally indistinguishable from defeat
negative_pole: Treats the operational objective as a specific terminus whose achievement is the operational endpoint, accepting peace offers that consolidate structural gains, terminating campaigns when the substantive objectives have been achieved, treating bounded-objective consolidation as the rational operational completion
behavioral_implication: When Alexander encounters a moment at which a competent peer would consolidate substantial structural gains, he will instead expand the objective horizon — refusing the consolidation as operationally equivalent to defeat — accepting the structural cost of overextension as the operational price of the limitless-horizon discipline that produces the operational reach the bounded-horizon framework cannot match

construct: Engineering reduction of acclaimed impossibility vs. acceptance of structural constraint
positive_pole: Treats every claimed-impossible structural constraint as a problem of operational engineering whose reduction is achievable through coordinated multi-month engineering investment — the Tyre causeway built across half a mile of sea against a fortified island, the Hydaspes upstream night crossing against an elephant-fronted defensive line — accepting the seven-month timeline and the engineering cost as the operational price of converting the impossibility into structural reality
negative_pole: Accepts claimed-impossible structural constraints as bounding operational possibility, redirecting effort to achievable adjacent objectives, treating the engineering cost of reducing the impossibility as exceeding any operational benefit
behavioral_implication: When Alexander encounters an acclaimed-impossible structural constraint, he will mobilize coordinated multi-month engineering investment to reduce the impossibility — treating the engineering project itself as the operational instrument and the demonstrated reduction as the load-bearing communication that produces structural-credibility outcomes far exceeding the specific constraint's reduction

construct: Engineered oracular and symbolic mandate construction vs. realist-institutional framing of authority
positive_pole: Engineers the symbolic-oracular registration of operational moves through coordinated public actions calibrated for divine-mandate reception — cutting the Gordian Knot to claim the prophesied rule of Asia, the Siwa Oracle visit to claim Ammon-sonship, the personal layout of Alexandria's city plan — treating the symbolic-mandate construction as the load-bearing legitimacy instrument whose continuing operation makes subsequent operational moves self-justifying
negative_pole: Frames operational authority through realist-institutional channels — alliance treaties, dynastic credentials, military victories — treating symbolic-oracular registration as ceremonial peripheral to the substantive realist legitimacy
behavioral_implication: When Alexander encounters a structural-legitimacy requirement, he will engineer the symbolic-oracular instrument through which the legitimacy is constructed — treating the symbolic-mandate construction as decisively load-bearing relative to the realist-institutional framing, and accepting the cost of the elaborate symbolic engineering (the Siwa journey, the personal city-plan layout) as the operational price of the legitimacy instrument's continuing operation

construct: Calibrated terror as targeted policy instrument vs. uniform application of severity or mercy
positive_pole: Calibrates terror and mercy by case-specific structural-utility — the razing of Thebes as Hellenic League policy signal that ended Greek revolt for the entire Asian campaign, the sparing of Porus as binding-instrument that converted the defeated king into a subordinate-ally — treating the case-specific calibration as the load-bearing operational variable rather than uniform-severity or uniform-mercy doctrine
negative_pole: Applies severity or mercy uniformly across cases regardless of structural-utility differences, treating uniform application as the principled foundation of policy and treating case-by-case calibration as inconsistent application
behavioral_implication: When Alexander encounters a defeated opponent or a rebellion, he will calibrate the response — total destruction, restoration as subordinate-ally, integration into the army — by the structural-utility of the specific case, accepting the substantive contradiction between case-specific calibrations as operationally required by the calibrated-instrument discipline that produces the policy-signal outcomes uniform application cannot reliably produce

construct: Dynastic-fusion absorption of conquered legitimacy vs. cultural-domination of conquered peoples
positive_pole: Absorbs the legitimacy-instruments of conquered structures by adopting their funeral honors, court customs, dynastic-marriage practices, and ceremonial registrations — burying Darius in the Achaemenid royal tombs, attempting proskynesis at the Bactrian court, marrying Roxana, staging the Susa mass-weddings — treating absorption of the conquered legitimacy as the load-bearing instrument through which empire-scale rule becomes operationally feasible
negative_pole: Imposes the conqueror's own customs and legitimacy-instruments on conquered peoples uniformly, treating cultural-domination as the load-bearing instrument of empire-control and treating absorption of conquered customs as a compromise of conqueror identity
behavioral_implication: When Alexander conquers a structurally-legitimate prior regime, he will absorb the regime's legitimacy-instruments into his own operational repertoire — court customs, royal funeral honors, dynastic marriages, ceremonial registrations — accepting the resistance from his own coalition (Macedonian officer alienation at proskynesis, at Persian troop integration, at the Susa weddings) as the operational price of the absorption that produces empire-scale legitimacy the cultural-domination framework cannot achieve

construct: Preemptive elimination of structural counter-nodes vs. accommodation of dissent within the coalition
positive_pole: Identifies structural counter-nodes — Caranus and the Lyncestian princes at the accession, Parmenion at Ecbatana, Philotas, Cleitus, Callisthenes — and eliminates them preemptively before the counter-coalition crystallizes operationally, treating the elimination as the load-bearing structural-stability instrument and accepting the operational cost (loss of Parmenion's continuing service, Macedonian-officer alienation) as the price of structural-stability preservation
negative_pole: Accommodates dissent within the coalition through power-sharing arrangements, delegated authorities, and political negotiation, treating the accommodation cost as the operational price of coalition-cohesion and treating preemptive elimination as politically catastrophic
behavioral_implication: When Alexander identifies a structural counter-node, he will eliminate the node preemptively — accepting the alienation of associated coalition members and the loss of the eliminated person's substantive contribution as the operational price of foreclosing the counter-coalition crystallization, with the speed of elimination (days at the accession, hours at the Cleitus killing) as the operational signature

construct: Heroic-narrative template organization of operational perception vs. realist-institutional framing
positive_pole: Organizes operational perception through the Iliad-as-Achilles-template — Hephaestion as Patroclus, the Asian campaign as kleos-quest, the Beas as the eastern terminus that must be reached for Achilles-redivivus completeness, the wound at Multan as Achilles-style wound — treating the heroic-narrative template as the load-bearing perceptual organizer that selects which operational situations register as load-bearing and which register as peripheral
negative_pole: Frames operational situations through realist-institutional categories — supply lines, administrative coverage, force-ratio analysis, political stability — treating heroic-narrative as ornamental and treating the institutional categories as the load-bearing perceptual organizer
behavioral_implication: When Alexander encounters an operational situation, the situation's significance is registered through Iliad-template categories — kleos achievable, heroic-precedent matching, narrative-completeness requirement — and the load-bearing situations are those registering as kleos-relevant, with realist-institutional considerations (logistics, governance, sustainability) systematically under-registering relative to their operational weight, producing the structural blindnesses (Gedrosian crossing, Hyphasis insistence) that the heroic-narrative organization implies

construct: Cue isolation under uncertainty vs. consensus-deference and committee-paralysis
positive_pole: Under operational uncertainty, isolates the load-bearing variable from the surface-feature complexity — the moving shadow that frightens Bucephalus, the seam in the Persian line at Gaugamela, the upstream river-bend that conceals the night crossing at the Hydaspes — and acts on the isolated cue regardless of the consensus position of advisers and the surface-feature complexity, treating the cue-isolation discipline as the load-bearing operational variable
negative_pole: Under operational uncertainty, defers to the consensus of advisers and the surface-feature complexity, treating the multi-variable assessment as the load-bearing operational input and treating cue-isolation as oversimplification or recklessness
behavioral_implication: When Alexander encounters operational uncertainty, his first cognitive move is to isolate the single load-bearing variable that the surface-feature complexity is concealing, and his operational move is to act on the isolated variable regardless of adviser consensus — treating the cue-isolation discipline as decisively load-bearing relative to the multi-variable assessment, and accepting the disagreement of competent advisers (Parmenion at Granicus and Gaugamela) as the operational signature of the discipline rather than as a reason to reconsider

construct: Tempo and forced-march pace as load-bearing operational variable vs. logistical-sustainability optimization
positive_pole: Treats operational tempo — the 14-day march from the Danube to Thebes, the 50-mile forced-march pursuit of Darius, the seven-day route across the Hindu Kush — as the load-bearing operational variable whose continuous escalation produces the strategic-surprise outcomes that logistical-sustainability optimization cannot match, accepting the casualty and exhaustion costs as the operational price of the tempo's continuing operation
negative_pole: Treats logistical-sustainability — supply replenishment intervals, casualty-recovery pauses, troop-rotation schedules — as the load-bearing operational variable that bounds tempo, accepting reduced strategic-surprise as the operational price of the sustainability optimization
behavioral_implication: When Alexander designs an operational movement, he will calibrate the pace to the upper edge of physical feasibility regardless of the logistical-sustainability cost — treating the strategic-surprise outcomes that the upper-edge tempo produces as decisively load-bearing relative to the casualty-and-exhaustion costs, with the failure mode (Gedrosian Desert losses) as the structural-blindspot signature of the discipline

construct: Personal-pole irreplaceability as force-multiplier vs. engineered institutional-redundancy of the leadership function
positive_pole: Concentrates operational authority in the personal-pole — strategic decision, tactical execution, ceremonial registration, succession-engineering — accepting that the resulting empire's structural integrity depends entirely on the personal-pole's continued operation, with no engineered redundancy or institutional-continuity infrastructure for the personal-pole's eventual removal
negative_pole: Engineers institutional redundancy across the leadership function — designated successors, delegable authorities, structural-continuity mechanisms — accepting reduced personal-pole force-multiplication as the operational price of the regime's structural-resilience to the personal-pole's removal
behavioral_implication: When Alexander structures the empire, he will concentrate authority in the personal-pole and decline to engineer institutional redundancy — treating the personal-pole concentration as the load-bearing force-multiplier and treating succession-engineering as a deferrable problem whose deferral is the operational signature of the discipline; the failure mode is the regime's structural-incoherence at the personal-pole's removal, which the framework cannot prevent because the framework is constituted by the personal-pole concentration
